name: Friendship Bonus
description: Increases the effectiveness of Friendship Training

name: Mood Effect
description: Amplifies the effect of mood when training together

name: Speed Bonus
description: Increases Speed gain when training together

name: Stamina Bonus
description: Increases Stamina gain when training together

name: Power Bonus
description: Increases Power gain when training together

name: Guts Bonus
description: Increases Guts gain when training together

name: Wit Bonus
description: Increases Wit gain when training together

name: Training Effectiveness
description: Increases the effectiveness of training performed together

name: Initial Speed
description: Increases initial Speed when beginning a Career playthrough

name: Initial Stamina
description: Increases initial Stamina when beginning a Career playthrough

name: Initial Power
description: Increases initial Power when beginning a Career playthrough

name: Initial Guts
description: Increases initial Guts when beginning a Career playthrough

name: Initial Wit
description: Increases initial Wit when beginning a Career playthrough

name: Initial Friendship Gauge
description: Increases initial Friendship Gauge when beginning a Career playthrough

name: Race Bonus
description: Increases stat gain from races

name: Fan Bonus
description: Increases fan gain from races

name: Hint Levels
description: Increases the level of hints gained through events

name: Hint Frequency
description: Increases the frequency at which hint events occur

name: Specialty Priority
description: Increases the frequency at which the character participates in their preferred training type

name: Max Speed
description: Increases max Speed value when beginning a Career playthrough

name: Max Stamina
description: Increases max Stamina value when beginning a Career playthrough

name: Max Power
description: Increases max Power value when beginning a Career playthrough

name: Max Guts
description: Increases max Guts value when beginning a Career playthrough

name: Max Wit
description: Increases max Wit value when beginning a Career playthrough

name: Event Recovery
description: Increases Energy recovery from this Support Card's events

name: Event Effectiveness
description: Increases stat gain from this Support Card's events

name: Failure Protection
description: Decreases the probability of failure when training together

name: Energy Cost Reduction
description: Decreases Energy consumed when training together

name: Minigame Effectiveness
description: Increases stat gain from minigames

name: Skill Point Bonus
description: Increases skill point gain when training together

name: Wit Friendship Recovery
description: Increases Energy recovery from Wit Friendship Training
